title: erigeron acutatus
intro: Erigeron acutatus, also known as the fleabane daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, fever, and various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Erigeron acutatus include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain, promote healing, and prevent infection. Erigeron acutatus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
